description_long: This is a large, broad-bladed sword with a distinctive, almost rectangular blade that tapers to a sharp point. The blade is predominantly black with a series of metallic, bronze-colored segments or plates running along its flat sides, giving it a reinforced, industrial appearance. The handle is straight and cylindrical, featuring a dark grip and a square pommel, with a metallic guard separating it from the blade. The guard and fittings are also bronze-colored, matching the segmented elements on the blade. The overall design is robust and heavy, suggesting a weapon built for strength rather than finesse. The sword's imposing size and unique construction make it stand out as a formidable urban fantasy or post-apocalyptic weapon.
description: A massive, black, rectangular sword with bronze segment reinforcements and a straight, dark handle with a square pommel.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the black blade with bronze segments and the straight handle.
description_view_1: Edge-on view highlighting the blade's thickness and the rectangular, reinforced profile.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the first, with clear visibility of the blade's length and segment details.
description_view_3: View from the handle end, showing the square pommel, guard, and the width of the blade.
attribute_blade_type: straight, single-edged, broad rectangular blade with pointed tip
attribute_handle_design: straight, cylindrical, dark grip with square pommel and metallic fittings
